source: MiniMon v2.30 (Christian Perschl, distributed by Infineon as freeware)
license: Freeware — see http://www.perschl.at/minimon/ and Infineon AP16064

blobs.name: LOADK.hex
blobs.role: primary loader, K-line variant (32-byte BSL upload)

blobs.name: MINIMONK.hex
blobs.role: secondary monitor, K-line variant (Minimon kernel running from RAM)

blobs.name: JMG_LOADK.hex
blobs.role: alternative primary loader (32-byte BSL upload, ack=0xC5, end=0xFDE1)

blobs.name: JMG_BLOB.hex
blobs.role: alternative monolithic secondary (898 bytes, built-in flash driver, custom single-byte protocol)

blobs.name: ERASE_STUB.hex
blobs.role: custom C167 erase stub for AM29F400BB (DQ7 poll, single-sector)

blobs.name: PROGRAMMER_STUB.hex
blobs.role: custom C167 programmer stub for AM29F400BB (fixed delay, word-program)

blobs.name: PROBE_STUB.hex
blobs.role: custom C167 autoselect probe stub (reads manufacturer/device ID)
